name: Assignment to Variable without Use
description: A variable is assigned a value that is never subsequently used before being reassigned or going out of scope. This 'dead store' may indicate buggy code, incomplete refactoring, or deprecated logic that was not removed.
detection_pattern: STORAGE node receives a value via TRANSFORM but the stored value has no outgoing edge to any CONTROL, EGRESS, or other consuming node before being overwritten or the scope ends. The assignment is a dead store with no downstream effect.
